title: Diagnostic criteria for mood (affective) disorders
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Clinical — major depressive disorder criteria, symptoms, and classification issues.
learningObjectives: Outline symptoms of major depressive disorder (unipolar).
Evaluate validity and cultural bias in mood disorder diagnosis.

simpleExplanation.title: More than feeling low
simpleExplanation.summary: Clinical depression involves persistent low mood, loss of interest, and associated symptoms over weeks — diagnosed using standardised criteria.
